title: Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers (CPI-U): All items, Honolulu, HI (semiannual, 1982-84=100)
limitations: Honolulu CPI is published semiannually (H1 and H2), not monthly — so within-year volatility is smoothed by construction.
Series uses a 1982-84 base; rebasing within the BLS reference series is rare but possible.
Hawaii non-Honolulu counties are not directly covered; this acts as a state-wide proxy.
